name: Apple Security Baby Blanket - Cloud Island™
description:
Add some fruity flair to your little one's essentials with this Apple Security Baby Blanket from Cloud Island™. Made from soft polyester fabric, this baby security blanket showcases a cute, soft apple toy at the top with checkered print and a handkerchief hem to catch your baby's attention. Perfectly sized for bedtime, car rides, stroller walks and more, this security blanket is great for both at-home and on-the-go use.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
